lessons.title: Why Permissions Matter
lessons.description: Learn why authorization is critical for web application security and how broken access control became the #1 vulnerability in OWASP's Top 10.

lessons.title: Permission Systems Overview
lessons.description: An overview of the major permission system approaches: RBAC, ABAC, and ReBAC, with guidance on when to use each.

lessons.title: Starter App Tour
lessons.description: Tour the Document Management System starter app and understand why it currently has no security - anyone can do anything.

lessons.title: Rbac Fundamentals
lessons.description: Understand the core concepts of Role-Based Access Control: roles, permissions, and how they map together.

lessons.title: Defining Roles and Permissions
lessons.description: Create the role and permission type definitions in TypeScript that will be the foundation of our authorization system.

lessons.title: Backend Middleware
lessons.description: Build Express middleware that checks user roles before allowing access to protected routes.

lessons.title: Frontend Permission Checks
lessons.description: Add role-based UI controls in React to show, hide, and disable elements based on user permissions.

lessons.title: Mistake Client Side Only
lessons.description: See what happens when you only check permissions on the frontend - and why backend validation is essential.

lessons.title: Rbac Limitations
lessons.description: Understand the limitations of pure RBAC and when you need to add attribute-based rules.

lessons.title: Abac Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core concepts of ABAC: attributes, policies, and how to make context-aware permission decisions.

lessons.title: Ownership Permissions
lessons.description: Implement ownership checks so editors can only edit documents they created.

lessons.title: Mistake Id Enumeration
lessons.description: Demo of ID enumeration attack and how to prevent users from accessing resources by guessing IDs.

lessons.title: Organization Scoping
lessons.description: Add organization-level isolation so users can only see and interact with their organization's data.

lessons.title: Mistake Mass Assignment
lessons.description: Demo of mass assignment vulnerability where users can modify fields they shouldn't have access to.

lessons.title: Field Level Read Permissions
lessons.description: Implement field-level read permissions to hide sensitive data from unauthorized users.

lessons.title: Field Level Write Permissions
lessons.description: Implement field-level write permissions to control which fields users can modify.

lessons.title: Policy Composition
lessons.description: Learn how to combine multiple conditions into complex policies that handle real-world business rules.

lessons.title: Rebac Fundamentals
lessons.description: Understand relationship-based access control and how it models permissions as a graph of relationships.

lessons.title: Document Sharing
lessons.description: Implement document sharing with a relationship table and permission checks.

lessons.title: Nested Relationships
lessons.description: Handle complex nested relationships like organization membership implying document access.

lessons.title: Zanzibar Overview
lessons.description: Brief overview of Google Zanzibar and production ReBAC systems like SpiceDB and OpenFGA.

lessons.title: Casl Overview
lessons.description: Introduction to CASL, a popular isomorphic authorization library for JavaScript/TypeScript.

lessons.title: Implementing Casl
lessons.description: Refactor our permission system to use CASL's defineAbility and ability checks.

lessons.title: Casl Typescript
lessons.description: Add TypeScript types to CASL for compile-time safety and IDE autocomplete.

lessons.title: Casbin Overview
lessons.description: Overview of Casbin's DSL-based approach to authorization with external policy files.

lessons.title: Library Comparison
lessons.description: Compare CASL and Casbin to understand when to use each library.

lessons.title: Api Design
lessons.description: Design the API for our custom permission library with a focus on simplicity and type safety.

lessons.title: Core Types
lessons.description: Define the TypeScript types and interfaces for our permission library.

lessons.title: Builder Pattern
lessons.description: Implement the builder pattern for collecting permission rules.

lessons.title: Permission Checking
lessons.description: Implement the can() and cannot() methods for checking permissions.

lessons.title: Condition Matching
lessons.description: Implement condition matching logic using simple equality checks.

lessons.title: Field Permissions
lessons.description: Implement field-level permission checking and filtering.

lessons.title: Drizzle Integration
lessons.description: Generate Drizzle ORM where clauses from permission rules.

lessons.title: React Integration
lessons.description: Create React components and hooks for frontend permission checks.

lessons.title: Complete Example
lessons.description: Put it all together and see our custom permission library in action.

lessons.title: Frontend Patterns
lessons.description: Best practices for implementing permission checks in React applications.

lessons.title: Backend Patterns
lessons.description: Compare middleware-based vs service-layer permission checking approaches.

lessons.title: Mistake Toctou
lessons.description: A subtle race condition in permission checking and how to prevent it.

lessons.title: Full Flow Demo
lessons.description: See the complete permission flow from login to database query to UI rendering.

lessons.title: Why Permission Editor
lessons.description: Understand when to use code-based permissions vs a UI-based permission editor.

lessons.title: Permission Storage
lessons.description: Create a database schema to store permission rules that can be edited at runtime.

lessons.title: Visual Editor Ui
lessons.description: Build a simple visual interface for viewing and editing permission rules.

lessons.title: Rule Editor Modal
lessons.description: Create a modal form for adding and editing permission rules with dropdowns and checkboxes.

lessons.title: Dynamic Loading
lessons.description: Load permission rules from the database and build abilities dynamically.

lessons.title: Best Practices
lessons.description: Best practices for permission editors including safety guardrails and audit logging.

lessons.title: Choosing the Right System
lessons.description: A decision framework for choosing between RBAC, ABAC, and ReBAC based on your application's needs.

lessons.title: Production Considerations
lessons.description: Performance optimization, audit logging, and other considerations for production permission systems.

lessons.title: Resources
lessons.description: Recommended tools, libraries, and learning resources for further exploration of permission systems.
